title: EaglerHostCorePlus
description: A plugin that brings plugin features and fixes to TopEagler users
body:
Notice: If downloading from Modrinth, use Spigot, Paper, or Bukkit; All three work the same on EaglerHost!

EaglerHost hosting platform: [Click Here](https://www.topeaglerservers.com/)

### Overview ###

EaglerHostCorePlus is designed specifically for [EaglerHost Server Hosting](https://www.topeaglerservers.com/) environments. It provides compatibility fixes, pre-configured YAML files, and server management utilities tailored for Eaglercraft-based servers.

### Existing Features ###

- Broadcasted countdowns before server shutdown

- Plugin update notifications for all installed plugins

### Planned Features ###

- Pre-configured Spigot, Bukkit, Paper, and Beast YAML configuration files designed for improved server stability

- Adjustments intended to reduce common instability issues in 24/7 hosted environments

- Compatibility fixes for plugins that may not function properly with Eaglercraft setups

### Purpose ###

This project is intended to simplify setup and improve reliability for administrators running Eaglercraft-based servers on TopEaglerServers hosting.
